footer.disclaimer: Disha is an unofficial guidance & counselling support platform. It is not the official admission portal. For notices, schedules, rules and allotments, always refer to the official Maharashtra CET Cell website.

disclaimer.short: Unofficial guidance platform — not the official admission portal.
disclaimer.full: Disha provides guidance and counselling support only. The Maharashtra State CET Cell and official CAP portals remain the authoritative source for all notices, schedules, rules and allotments.

testimonials.title: Calm company through a stressful season

0.quote: I kept losing track of option-form dates. Disha told me exactly what was due next, in Marathi. It felt like having a patient elder explain everything.
0.name: Sai Patil

1.quote: I asked everything in Hindi by voice while travelling. Every answer pointed back to the official notice, so I always knew it was right.
1.name: Aarti Deshmukh

2.quote: The next-steps list took the guesswork out of CAP. We knew what to do after the merit list without panicking.
2.name: Rahul More

landing.ctaSecondaryNote: Free to start. No card needed.

pricing.title: Simple plans for the CAP season
pricing.subtitle: Validity is 1 year or till the admission cut-off date — whichever is earlier.
pricing.validityNote: Validity: 1 year or till admission cut-off (whichever is earlier).
pricing.paymentNote: Secure INR payments via Razorpay — UPI, cards & net-banking.

0.q: What does the validity period mean?
0.a: Every paid plan stays active for one year from purchase, or until the official admission cut-off date — whichever comes first. This keeps a plan aligned to a single CAP season.

1.q: Which payment methods can I use?
1.a: Payments are processed securely in INR through Razorpay. You can pay using UPI, debit or credit cards, and net-banking.

2.a: Yes. Start on the free plan and upgrade to Premium or Super Premium any time from your billing page. Your guidance carries over.

3.a: Because access is granted instantly, refunds are limited. Please read our refund policy for the full details before purchasing.

features.title: Everything you need to move through CAP with confidence
features.subtitle: Disha brings grounded answers, your language, and clear next steps into one calm place.

multilingual.title: Ask by chat or voice, in your language
multilingual.body: Type or speak naturally in English, Hindi or Marathi. Hear answers read back aloud — useful on the move or for parents who prefer to listen.

grounded.title: Answers only from verified knowledge
grounded.body: The bot replies strictly from notices and FAQs uploaded and approved by admins. When something isn't in the knowledge base, it says so honestly instead of guessing.

sources.title: See the source behind every answer
sources.body: Each grounded reply carries citation chips that link to the exact notice or FAQ it came from, so you can always check the original.

cta.title: See it for yourself

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers about how Disha works, your data, and the CAP process.
faq.stillStuckBody: We're happy to help. Reach out and we'll get back to you.

0.q: Is Disha the official CAP admission portal?
0.a: No. Disha is an independent guidance and counselling support platform. It is not affiliated with the Maharashtra CET Cell. For official notices, schedules, rules and allotments, always rely on the official CET Cell website.

1.q: Where do the bot's answers come from?
1.a: Every answer is drawn strictly from a knowledge base of notices and FAQs uploaded and approved by our team. The bot never uses general internet knowledge, and it shows the source for each answer.

2.q: What happens if my question isn't covered?
2.a: Instead of guessing, the bot tells you the information isn't in its knowledge base and points you to the official CET Cell / CAP website or to support.

3.a: You can chat and use voice in English, Hindi and Marathi. Hindi and Marathi are shown in proper Devanagari script, never transliterated.

4.a: Yes. The free plan covers general CAP queries by chat and voice in all three languages. Paid plans add profile memory, personalised next steps and counselling.

5.a: We collect only what is needed to provide guidance, and you can edit or delete your saved profile at any time. See our privacy policy for the full picture.

about.title: Calm, trustworthy guidance through Maharashtra CAP
about.lead: Admission season is stressful enough. Disha exists to make the Centralised Admission Process easier to understand — in the language families actually speak.
about.missionBody: Every year, lakhs of students and parents navigate CAP under real pressure — deadlines, documents, merit lists and option forms. Reliable information is scattered and often only in English. Disha gathers verified guidance into one place and answers your questions in English, Hindi or Marathi, by chat or voice.

grounded.title: Grounded, never guessing
grounded.body: Answers come only from verified, admin-approved knowledge — with the source shown every time.

multilingual.title: Truly multilingual
multilingual.body: First-class Hindi and Marathi in real Devanagari, so no family is left reading a second language under pressure.

honest.title: Honest about our role
honest.body: We are guidance and counselling support — not the official portal. We always point you back to the official source.

calm.title: Designed to lower the heart rate
calm.body: Clear next steps and a gentle, second-person voice that treats you like a person, not a ticket number.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These terms govern your use of Disha. By creating an account or using the service, you agree to them. Please read them alongside our privacy and refund policies.

0.p: Disha is an independent guidance and counselling support platform for the Maharashtra Centralised Admission Process (CAP). It is not the official admission portal and is not affiliated with the Maharashtra CET Cell.

1.p: Information provided by Disha is for guidance only. Official notices, schedules, eligibility rules, merit lists and allotments are determined solely by the CET Cell and official CAP portals. Always verify decisions against the official source.

2.p: You are responsible for keeping your login details secure and for activity under your account. Provide accurate information and keep it up to date.

3.p: Do not misuse the service, attempt to disrupt it, or use it for unlawful purposes. We may suspend accounts that abuse the platform.

4.p: Paid plans grant access to additional features for a stated validity period. Payments are processed by our payment partner. See the refund policy for details on refunds.

5.p: Disha is provided on an as-is basis. We are not liable for admission outcomes or for decisions made based on guidance. Your admission depends entirely on the official CAP process.

6.p: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use after changes means you accept the updated terms.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains what information Disha collects, how we use it, and the choices you have. We collect only what is needed to provide guidance.

0.p: Account details such as your name, email or mobile number; the language you prefer; and, if you choose, profile information like your category and course interests to personalise guidance.

1.p: To provide and improve guidance, personalise next steps, process payments, send service notifications, and keep the platform secure.

2.p: Your questions are used to generate grounded answers from our knowledge base and may be stored to maintain your chat history and improve quality.

3.p: We do not sell your personal information. We share data only with service providers who help us operate Disha, such as payment and messaging partners, under appropriate safeguards.

4.p: You can view, edit or delete your saved profile at any time, and manage notification preferences from your settings.

5.p: We use reasonable technical and organisational measures to protect your information. No system is perfectly secure, so please keep your credentials safe.

6.p: For privacy questions or requests, contact us at the support email listed on our contact page.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.intro: This policy explains how refunds work for paid Disha plans. Please read it before purchasing.

0.p: Paid plans unlock premium features immediately after a successful payment. Because access is granted instantly, purchases are generally non-refundable.

1.p: If you were charged more than once for the same plan, or a payment was deducted without access being granted, contact support and we will investigate and refund duplicate or failed charges.

2.p: Plan validity is one year from purchase or until the official admission cut-off date, whichever is earlier. Refunds are not provided for unused time within an active validity period.

3.p: Email support with your registered email and payment reference. Approved refunds are returned to the original payment method through our payment partner.

notFound.title: We couldn't find that page
notFound.body: The page you're looking for may have moved or never existed. Let's get you back on track.
